/usr/bin/ar qc libs3.a CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_crypto.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_xml.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_sigv4.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_http.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_error.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_client.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_log.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_retry.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_object.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_object_config.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_list.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_multipart.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_bucket.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_bucket_config.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_presign.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_select.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_checksum.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_sse.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_async.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_pool.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_highlevel.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_control.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_access_point.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_object_lambda.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_access_grants.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_mrap.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_batch.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_storage_lens.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_express.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_tables.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_vectors.c.o CMakeFiles/s3_static.dir/src/s3_outposts.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libs3.a
